final_output:
Ben's eyes shimmered with something akin to childlike awe as he traced the lines of an ancient scroll with his fingertip. "Imagine," he whispered, leaning back in his chair, "how these stories were passed down through generations – not by words on a page, but sung!  Echoing voices weaving magic into every song, carrying tales that would resonate across time and space."

He launched into a vibrant description of the human history of music. It wasn't just about melodies
